title: BBQ Salmon with Mango Avocado Salsa
info_html:
• Time: TBD
  • Servings: 2-4 portions (depending on how much salmon)
ingredients_html:
Salmon:

  • 1-2 lbs fresh salmon
  • 2 TBSP brown sugar
  • 2 tsp smoked paprika
  • 2 tsp onion powder
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 1/2 tsp chili powder
  • 1/2 tsp kosher salt
  • 2 TBSP olive oil

Mango Avocado Salsa:

  • 2 mangoes, diced
  • 1 avocado, diced
  • 1/4 cup cilantro, minced
  • 1/4 cup red onion, minced
  • 1/2 jalepeno, minced
  • 1 tsp honey
  • 2 TBSP lime juice
  • 1 tsp lime zest
  • salt to tast

For serving:

  • 1-1/2 cups rice
steps_html:
1. Mango salsa: In a medium bowl, mix all ingredients. Taste and adjust seasoning.
  2. Cook rice according to package instructions.
  3. Preheat oven to 475 deg F, and line a baking sheet with foil.
  4. In a small bowl, mix brown sugar, smoked paprika, onion powder, garlic powder, chili powder, salt, and olive oil to make a paste. Rub paste over the top of the salmon.
  5. Bake for 6-12 minutes, or until fully cooked.
  6. Serve rice, salmon, and mango avocado salsa in a bowl and enjoy!
